[[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] forces used [[Cargo ferry]] '''''Mangonel''''' during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. ''Mangonel'' aided other Dimok [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in raiding a [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] supply convoy in the beginning of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sepan campaign]]. With intent to drive off the Dimok raiders, Imperial [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] destroyed Cargo ferry ''Mangonel''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
